title: François Villeroy de Galhau: One year on - why the transatlantic partnership remains of mutual interest
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France, at the Atlantic Council, Washington DC, 15 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416l.htm

title: Denis Beau: The challenges posed by AI from the perspective of the central bank
body:
Speech by Mr Denis Beau, First Deputy Governor of the Bank of France, at an event organised by the Institut d'Administration des Entreprises, Brest, 2 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416j.htm

title: Bas ter Weel: Resilient payments - cash, card, connected
body:
Opening address by Mr Bas ter Weel, Executive Board Member of Monetary Affairs of De Nederlandsche Bank, at the DNB's Retail Payments Research Conference 2026 "Future-proof payments: innovative, resilient and inclusive", Amsterdam, 9 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260416g.htm

title: Yannis Stournaras: Monetary and broader policy considerations for the euro area under the present energy price shock
body:
Speech by Mr Yannis Stournaras, Governor of the Bank of Greece, at the Economist Romania Government Roundtable "Monetary and broader policy considerations for the euro area under the present energy price shock", Bucharest, 30 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260410h.htm

title: Yannis Stournaras: The Greek economy ten years after the crisis - lessons for national economies, the eurozone and future challenges
body:
Speech by Mr Yannis Stournaras, Governor of the Bank of Greece, at the National Bank of Romania, Bucharest, 30 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260410i.htm

title: François Villeroy de Galhau: Navigating an uncertain world - steering monetary policy in the right direction to hold our course
body:
Speech by Mr François Villeroy de Galhau, Governor of the Bank of France, at Sciences Po, Paris, 2 April 2026.

title: Denis Beau: Stablecoins - what strategic choices for Europe?
body:
Speaking points (virtually) by Mr Denis Beau, First Deputy Governor of the Bank of France, at the EUROFI High Level Seminar, session "Stablecoins: what strategic choices for Europe?", Nicosia, 26 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260331b.htm

title: Philip R Lane: AI and the euro area economy
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Philip R Lane, Member of the Executive Board of the European Central Bank, at the Third International Conference on the Climate-Macro-Finance Interface (3CMFI) "Emerging macroeconomic, financial, and environmental policy challenges in an era of policrisis and rising uncertainties", organised by the Rimini Centre for Economic Analysis-Europe (RCEA-Europe), the Leibniz Institute for Financial Research SAFE of the Goethe University Frankfurt, the Deutsche Bundesbank, and the European Central Bank, Frankfurt am Main, 23 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260407f.htm
